prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约4478→4504→4752→3883，2021–2023年逐年小幅后移（累计后移约274名），2024年大幅前移约869名至3883位，竞争明显加剧；2025年该校在青海省未招收理科/物理类考生，故以2024年3883名为最近基准位次；2021–2024年理科计划均为15人，2026年物理类计划16人，较2024年扩招1人（+6.7%），扩招使竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2026年第52名，排名稳步提升，对考生吸引力增强；2023年声誉评价偏负面（学校管理相关事件），2026年无显著声誉事件；抖音热度排名第71位，评价"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；无投档线断档记录；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A+，两个A+学科在全国处于顶尖水平，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 食品科学与工程（A+）属生化环材大类，社会舆论"明显劝退"；机械工程、高分子材料与工程等工科专业热度平稳；青海省2026年高考总人数约48000人（不确定），按近年物理类占比约63.9%估算约30672人，；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属东部发达地区，对西部省份考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生占比极小（约0.3%–0.4%），招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年位次大幅前移（竞争加剧）、2026年扩招1人（缓解竞争）、学校排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、青海省考生总数略有增加（加剧竞争）等多因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应部分抵消，但学校排名上升和2024年位次前移趋势表明报考热度持续升温。，结合学校排名上升和考生小幅增加，预计2026年最低位次约4058名，区间3558–4558名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 4478 → 4504 → 4752 → 3883. From 2021 to 2023, it gradually shifted backward (cumulative shift of about 274 places), and in 2024, it moved significantly forward by about 869 places to 3883, indicating intensified competition. In 2025, the university did not admit science/physics category candidates in Qinghai Province, so the 2024 ranking of 3883 is used as the most recent baseline. From 2021 to 2024, the science enrollment plan was 15 students each year, and in 2026, the physics category plan is 16 students, an increase of 1 student (+6.7%) compared to 2024. This expansion slightly alleviates competition, but the effect is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to school management-related incidents), but in 2026, there were no significant reputation events. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71st, with a rating of 'average,' indicating moderate short video exposure and no abnormal signals in application popularity. There is no record of admission cutoff line breaks. Its Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) and Food Science and Engineering (A+) are top-tier nationwide, strongly attracting candidates to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Food Science and Engineering (A+) falls under the biochemistry, environmental, chemical, and materials categories, with significant public discouragement. Engineering majors like Mechanical Engineering and Polymer Materials and Engineering have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Qinghai Province is about 48,000 (uncertain), with an estimated 30,672 in the physics category based on a recent proportion of about 63.9%. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, an eastern developed region, offering some regional appeal to candidates from western provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai is very small (about 0.3%–0.4%), and the enrollment scale is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant forward shift in 2024 rankings (intensified competition), the expansion of 1 student in 2026 (alleviating competition), the continuous rise in university ranking (enhancing appeal), and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Qinghai (intensifying competition), the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect partially offset each other. However, the rising university ranking and the forward trend in 2024 rankings indicate that application popularity is heating up. Combined with the university's rising ranking and a slight increase in candidates, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be around 4058, with a range of 3558–4558.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Food Science and Engineering (Wuxi, Jiangsu)
- Mechanical Engineering (Wuxi, Jiangsu)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Light Chemical Engineering (Wuxi, Jiangsu)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Environmental Science (Wuxi, Jiangsu) (First and second years at Lihu Campus, third and fourth years at Yixing Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 3558–4558, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3558), you can prioritize Food Science and Engineering (A+ flagship). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>4558), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
